calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2020 Continued To Oct-14-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion
Off Calendar Jul-07-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant X'Nova, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Nicole Rodich, CSR #11604. Telephone: 415-551-5869. Email: nrodich@sftc.org.

Christopher D. Deny, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Carnivalmas, LLC.
Stavros Lee, Owner and Manager of Carnivalmas, LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant X'Nova, Inc.
Both Messrs. Denny and Lee appeared for this morning's proceedings via CourtCall.
No appearance by defendant X'Nova, LLC.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Common Counts and Fraud was filed on November 14, 2019 and personally served on defendant X'Nova, Inc.'s Authorized Agent of Process on December 28, 2019.*
Default as to defendant X'Nova, Inc. was entered on January 28, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 14, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Carnivalmas, LLC, and against the defaulted defendant X'Nova, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $37,459.61. (Amount Pled in Complaint).
Prejudgment Interest - $1,872.98.
Attorney Fees - $3,750.00.
Costs - $704.85.

Total - $43,787.44.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

*Paragraph 14 of the Carnivalmas Client Agreement with defendant X'Nova, Inc. (attached to the complaint) mandates dispute resolution through binding arbitration. That notwithstanding, the Court makes a determination that this matter shall go forward this morning. Conversely, the Court shall entertain a motion to set-aside the Court Judgment, and have the matter resolved through binding arbitration, should defendant X'Nova, Inc. make such motion within the statutory alotted time to file said motion.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
